logs

18.jul.26 :) this game makes me smile but also rip my hair out due to emotional stress

i don't really like suffering in video games unless needed (see bloodborne) so i've just been trying to collect the egss, maybe in Another Time i might go through the secret bosses but not now. i am also playing silksong alongside deltarune so like. i like to keep the suffering meter at a decent percentage.

but anyways i've been loving this so so so much. i grew up with homestuck, got into undertale because of toby fox, and now i am here. literally in my natural habitat. i just started playing chapter 4 and honestly i am kinda scared.

fav music

i will foerever gas up toby fox musical capabilities i don't gaf i really TRULY believe he is such a goated composer and having witness his growth as an artists is so awesome. here's some of my favorite songs from the OST!

i cried on my first listen of ruder buster

screenshots

gonna be sharing stuff that made me giggle or just moments i liked. spoilers ahead!

if you are adding me to any of these, please send me a message or an e-mail to me know who you are! i don't accept requests from people i don't know :p
